steps.title: Identify the slope and equation of line s
steps.content:
The line $y = 36x + 6$ has slope 36. Since line $s$ is parallel, it has the same slope: 36.

Line $s$ passes through $(0,0)$ with slope 36. Using the slope-intercept form $y = mx + b$:
$$y = 36x + 0 = 36x$$

steps.title: Evaluate at the point (9, d)
steps.content:
Since $(9,d)$ lies on line $s$ with equation $y = 36x$, substitute $x = 9$:
$$d = 36(9) = 324$$
